introduction: Today, we'll review the browser update enforcement campaign led by Jason Wong in May 2025. This campaign was aimed at improving our online and delivery service user experience.

subsections.heading: Browser Usage Statistics of Lee's Market Customers
subsections.content:
• Chrome is the most-used browser among our customers, accounting for 65% of total usage
• Firefox and Safari come next, with 20% and 10% usage, respectively
• Edge and other browsers account for the remaining 5% of usage
• In the last quarter, there was a 3% increase in mobile browser usage among our customers
• There is a trend of increasing usage of privacy-focused browsers like Brave and Tor, but still, they represent less than 1% of total usage
• We observed that customers using updated browsers tend to spend 15% more time on our site
subsections.justification: This slide provides information on customer browser usage, not the internal browser update campaign run by Jason Wong.

subsections.heading: Overview of May 2025 Browser Update Campaign
subsections.content:
• The campaign was planned and executed in collaboration with our IT and Marketing departments
• We used a phased rollout approach to minimize potential disruptions to our online services
• We targeted all major browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge
• Email notifications were sent to all staff members informing them about the update
• We monitored the campaign progress using real-time analytics and dashboards
• The campaign was concluded successfully within the planned timeframe
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the process and strategy of the campaign, not specific actions taken by Jason Wong.

subsections.heading: Impact of Browser Update Campaign on Online Sales
subsections.content:
• There was a slight decrease in online sales immediately after the campaign, likely due to temporary disruption
• A week after the campaign, online sales returned to normal levels
• In the following month, we noticed a 7% increase in online sales compared to the previous month
• The checkout process on our website became smoother for customers using updated browsers
• Our website's loading time improved, which may have contributed to the increase in sales
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact of the campaign on sales, not the actions taken by Jason Wong during the campaign.

conclusion: The browser update enforcement campaign has played a significant role in enhancing our customer's online shopping experience. Moving forward, we'll continue to monitor browser usage trends and make necessary updates to meet our customers' needs.
